i’m leaving this review because i was staying in the same room with my friend at courtyard by marriott austin pflugerville for a wedding and what happened afterward has been extremely frustrating and suspicious
we came straight from the airport to get ready for the event
while getting dressed my friend hung his blazer vest and shirt in the room’s closet which is hidden behind a large mirror and very easy to overlook if you’re not paying attention
when we checked out we were in a rush to get to the airport and unfortunately forgot to check that closet before leaving
later when he realized the clothes were left behind we honestly weren’t worried at all
we assumed housekeeping would obviously find them during cleaning and place them in lost and found
the worst case scenario we expected was simply paying to have them shipped back
however when he contacted the hotel management said nothing was found in the room
at the same time they insisted their housekeeping team performs thorough inspections after every checkout and that their staff has high integrity and always turns in any items left behind
the problem is these weren’t small items that could easily go unnoticed
it was a blazer vest and shirt hanging in the closet
the vest in particular meant a lot because it was custom made for him by his grandmother from special fabric
so the explanation doesn’t really add up
either the room wasn’t actually inspected properly or someone found the items and didn’t report them
what should have been a simple lostandfound situation has turned into a completely unnecessary mystery
it’s disappointing to see this kind of situation handled this way at a marriott property

if you stay here i would strongly recommend double checking everything in your room before leaving and keeping close track of your belongings because based on our experience there’s no guarantee items left behind will make it to lost and found
the hotel has a way of making you feel settled almost immediately
the reception team are warm efficient and genuinely attentive turning arrival into something smooth and quietly reassuring rather than merely routine

the room is spotless and remarkably quiet breakfast is simple but clearly prepared with care and the peaceful surroundings make deep restorative sleep feel like one of the hotel’s most natural comforts
more than anything though it is the value that lingers

the level of comfort and consideration feels distinctly beyond what the rate prepares you for and it is that understated generosity that makes the hotel so easy to recommend and so easy to picture returning to
i had an extremely disappointing experience with courtyard by marriott austin pflugerville and feel compelled to warn future guests
i came directly from the airport to stay here for a friend’s wedding
while getting ready i hung my blazer vest and shirt in the room’s closet which is hidden behind a large mirror and extremely discreet
because of how concealed it is i unfortunately forgot to check it when leaving
i checked out early and went straight to the airport to fly home
when i realized later that i had left my clothes behind i actually felt reassured at first
i assumed housekeeping would obviously find them and put them in lost and found
i even expected that the worst case would simply be paying for shipping to have them returned
instead the hotel management told me their housekeeping performs a “thorough inspection” of every room after checkout and that their staff always turns in lost items due to their high integrity
yet somehow they also claim nothing was found
that explanation makes absolutely no sense
these items were not small or easy to miss — it was a full blazer vest and shirt hanging in the closet
to make matters worse the vest had deep sentimental value because my grandmother had it custom made from special fabric for me
so this leaves only two possible conclusions
the room was not actually inspected thoroughly despite management insisting it was
someone found the items and chose not to report them
either scenario reflects very poorly on the hotel’s operations and integrity
what should have been a simple lostandfound situation has turned into a completely unnecessary mystery
the hotel’s repeated claims about their “honest staff” and “thorough inspections” don’t line up with the reality that large obvious items vanished from the room
guests staying here should be cautious
keep careful track of everything you bring into your room because if something is left behind you may never see it again
this experience has left a very bad impression and i expected far better accountability from a marriott property

room hair found in the bed
room presence of bugs jumping on the bed and countertops
room flying insects visible around the light fixtures

i travel frequently for work and typically choose marriott properties for consistency and professionalism
unfortunately my experience with ac hotel austin hill country was a total failure from start to finish—and one that has left lasting damage to my trust in the marriott brand
i had a confirmed reservation at this hotel along with two of my employees for a work trip that required us to stay near our austin office
upon arrival we were informed—without prior notice—that our rooms had been given away
three out of four members of my team were effectively stranded
the hotel’s initial solution a downgrade to a star hotel minutes away
we had to push back to be moved to a more reasonable star option that was only minutes away
why this wasn’t offered up front is beyond me
we were offered a lower nightly rate and a comped first night which at the time seemed like a reasonable though frustrating gesture
then it got worse
after being told the hotel was fully booked i watched as two guests checked in right after us
when we arrived at the alternate hotel residence inn they attempted to charge night—far above both the advertised rate of and our original ac hotel rate of
so now we’re being pushed to an inferior property and asked to pay significantly more for the privilege
then i find out the alternate hotel is pet friendly and as someone with a severe cat allergy this becomes a health issue
when i called back to ac hotel for help the night staff didn’t offer any solutions
i physically went to the front desk of the hotel i was reassigned to and i was again refused any meaningful assistance
they insisted on applying the comp night to the hotel that was making me sick and only offered help in rebooking at standard rates
throughout the ordeal we kept hearing “if a manager were here this could be handled differently
” yet somehow no manager was ever available
to whomever owns or manages this location you gave away our rooms offered poor alternatives tried to overcharge us and then left me in an allergytriggering room without any real attempt to resolve it
this experience was not only deeply unprofessional it was negligent
this trip has permanently changed how i view marriott

given the late hour i used a sheet from a comforter set provided in a plastic bag presumably for the couch to cover the stained bedsheet and went to bed

if it was any other weekend i would have been ok with it but this was our wedding weekend and we had filled a considerable number of rooms at this hotel and brought them a ton of business

i also had an email chain back and forth emails in total plus phone calls with their team ahead of the wedding to make sure everything was set and that things would run smoothly on our weekend at the hotel
one of my bridesmaids had also booked a suite nonskyline view so i called her and she agreed to let us take their suite for the weekend which i felt horrible about

we ended up having the rebook the people who were going to stay in their suite into two other hotel rooms and it took a considerable amount of negotiation with the hotel staff to get them to match the price of the suite for the weekend for having to get them two new rooms
i spent over an hour at the front desk while trying to check in and my bridesmaid also spent a considerable amount of time at the front desk when checking in due to the issue
i would have expected the hotel to own their mistake and offer that up right away as a solution
additionally i was told that one night of our suite stay would be comped by the hotel for all of the trouble
upon checkout we were only given off one of the nights
i visited the front desk and explained what i was told at checkin and was assured that the night would be comped once the manager came in
days later no comp

and eventually we received a call from the operations manager who said that we would not receive a comp because they had to match the price for the additional hotel rooms which is not what we were told
my husband swiftly pushed back and after yet another call with a different manager the issue was finally fixed
overall this was the only thing that went wrong with our wedding weekend
the hotel itself is very nice besides a suspicious stain on the bedroom curtains in the suite
i would expect staff to own their mistakes
it makes zero sense to me why the hotel reservation system would allow suites to be overbooked modern technology is smarter than this
as a couple referring so many people to so many rooms i did expect better service than what we received
overall it was disappointing and i would hesitate to use this hotel again for a large event

after a very long day of packing our house and loading a moving container we needed a place to stay with our two cats before starting our very long road trip to our new house in arizona

we decided on this hotel as it was one of the only in the austin area that actually allowed cats had a suite with a door that separates the bedroom from the living room we love our cats but they arent allowed in the bedroom when we sleep because they dont understand personal space and wasnt a budget super type place

it was a little bit of a splurge as we definitely wanted a really nice place for our first night because we were going to be exhausted and it was going to be our cats first experience staying someplace other than home

glad we decided on ac hotel the marriott mobile key makes it really easy when traveling with pets because you dont need to awkwardly stand in the lobby for minutes when checking in while the clerk types on the computer before giving you a key you can just use your phone to gain access to the room so you can go straight in
no fuss less stress on the pets and on their owners
my only issue and this is likely just bad luck that we had a room with this issue the hvac in the bedroom area wasnt working

there was no air coming out of the vent the living room area was perfectly air conditioned but unless you kept the door open into the living room the bedroom would get quite toasty as there was no airflow

the hotel was nice enough to send up a box fan which allowed us to blow the cool air from the living room into the bedroom where we were sleeping but it did mean the cats also had free access and therefore i slept most of the night with a cat on my head
not ideal but i still think its a great hotel in the fact that they dont discriminate against cats the way most hotels in texas do makes me love it all the more

i recently had to take my mother to get a heart procedure in austin and they expect you there early
we live in san marcos but we dont have an automobile and its very unlikely to get an uber in san marcos at am
so we needed to stay over in austin the night before to get to the hospital on time
there were some budget tier motels very close by but i wasnt willing to subject my mother to the standards which often exist at that price point
the fairfield inn seemed like a good option there were some others close by but fairfield is what i decided on
i dont believe ive ever been to a marriott owned property before
some residents i know who live in austin as well as other reviewers cautioned me to be careful because the motel is located in a sketchy neighborhood
i suspect this is more due to vagrancy than criminality
i did not feel unsafe inside the motel which are all interior entrances
it is right by the freeway i would not necessarily feel safe walking for any length outside
the room was generally nice and clean
i felt the carpets were clean enough to walk barefoot

i was surprised to discover confirmed by the manager and by me checking it out afterwards that marriott doesnt put can liners in the trash cans
i think this is mistake but i wont take points off for that either just remember to bring your own trash bags
the room came with a fridge but not a microwave though there is a microwave for use in the lobby
i asked for a room with a microwave and fridge
they said all rooms come with both so staff was either lying or misinformed
there was a new clerk training when i checked in so
they also said the room would have a bathbench in it per my request it did not
this was not essential so i didnt complain but again it would have been nice to have been properly informed
there was also a deposit for incidentals which i can understand but the my reservation made direct on the marriott website never said anything about it
the manager said the authorization would fall off in seven days and it did

the fridge itself has some sort of energy saving setting which you could override but not in perpetuity so i did override it but had some concern that the food we brought was not going to stay cold however it did stay cold
the ice machine was the old style scoop which some might consider a less sanitary option however everything looked clean to me
the air conditioning was loud but functioned very well the loudness did not bother me at all but it does some people so keep that in mind

i was going to go to the store and get air freshner but it was late so i called the front desk to see if they had anything to freshen the room
the front desk attendant said she would come up to assess the room and bring freshner
she came up and immediately noticed the smell and sprayed the room which helped
she offered to switch my room but it was late and i was ready for bed so i declined so she offered to have my room cleaned while i was gone for the day
i showered which was disgusting in itself because i could hear my feet sticking to the floor as i walking in the restroom
i finally showered and went to bed
the next morning i visited the front desk to remind them about cleaning the room due to the smell sticky floor and food crumbs that were on the floor
they assured me that they would clean the room good for me that day
i returned that night from work around pm and noticed that nothing had been done
housekeeping came in and made the beds but they did not do a clean of the room and the food crumbs from the previous guest was still under the bed
once again being tired i went to bed and said that i would address it with the staff in the morning
the next morning i addressed it again and of course when i returned the room had not been cleaned and the food crumb was still there
i travel a lot for work and i typically stay at a marriott for my personal and business uses and this hotel was a complete disappointment in so many way
from the smell lack of cleaning rusty bathroom fixtures dirty wallpaper and popcorn ceiling i would certainly never ever stay here again and i would never ever ever recommend this hotel

i am a frequent business government traveler who stays in austin a few nights a week for work
unfortunately this week i forgot my bank card with my little sister didn’t have a backup option outside of apple pay… which i’ve been able to use successfully at alol establishments
i asked the front desk if i would be able to check in using apple pay and they told me that the system isn’t wired for digital transactions
i told them i understood but since the banks were closed would i be able to show them the card to type it in have a copy on my phone or zelle someone on staff the money i was desperate lol
my plan was to go to the bank in the morning to get a temporary card show them the next day since they needed to see the physical card
they told me that both options were out of their company policy there was nothing they could do
i got so desperate that i attempted to ask a fellow guest for help… could i send the cash for one night via zelle they use their physical card to show the front desk ms
donna approached me and told me that they don’t allow people to “do that here”
i suppose she meant ask guests for help bcs it could be considered a bother
i was so embarrassed
i started crying apologized to the gentleman bcs i didn’t even realize how it could have been perceived
she also proceeded to tell me that all the other hotels in the area operated under the same policy
her last words were “so you want to go ahead cancel” no remorse for a young woman in tears with nowhere to stay overnight
this could happen to anyone… but i digress
i left with zero options and called aloft to let them know my dilemma and see if they would accommodate me
they were happy to type the card number told me to come on by
that got me thinking that maybe one of the hotels that she said couldn’t accommodate actually could
i drove min up the street to fairfield inn let them know the pickle i was in
they told me that it would be easy for them to validate the card using their authenticator
they typed it in i was checked in under minutes with no prior reservation
the team went on to inform me that courtyard has the same pos and capability to validate cards if you don’t have the physical copy
i’m assuming that the courtyard team just didn’t want to help me
the upside is the offered to give me a refund on the room so i guess that’s a plus
i am so grateful to the fairfield team for not leaving me stranded overnight in a city where i have no friends or additional support
i wish there were more serviceoriented humans like them working in the hospitality industry
in the end i was happy that it didn’t work out… breakfast is included the entire hotel fairfield is very clean… bathroom is spotless
just looked at a few other reviews for this courtyard saw others complaining about the management team lack of breakfast cleanliness of the rooms
i very likely dodged a bullet… normally wouldn’t pick them but it was a last minute reservation since i needed to be in town for a panel
oh i’m a bonvoy silver member who’s been using the marriott brand for travel for the last years i was gold last year but got downgraded since i travel less these days if that adds any other context

i don’t need a resolution just sharing with others… you’re better off staying in one of the other hotels in the area… clean comes with breakfast comes with an accommodating front desk staff who makes the world of difference in the customer experience

the islamabad marriott hotel is a distinguished star establishment situated at the base of the margalla hills in islamabad pakistan

its prime location offers convenient access to notable attractions such as rawal lake the pakistan national council of arts and various cultural heritage sites including saidpur village and faisal mosque
the hotel features a variety of dining options each specializing in different cuisines
nadia coffee shop offers buffetstyle meals and an à la carte menu with international and local flavors
lily serves authentic chinese cuisine including cantonese and szechuan dishes
the royal elephant specializes in traditional thai dishes prepared by expert thai chefs
kiku provides contemporary japanese cuisine featuring live sushi preparations
zigolini focuses on italian cuisine offering freshly made pasta and thincrust pizzas from a brick oven
in addition to its dining venues the hotel offers amenities such as complimentary onsite and valet parking and an airport shuttle service upon request
overall the islamabad marriott hotel is recognized for its strategic location diverse culinary offerings and comprehensive amenities making it a prominent choice for visitors to islamabad

tried the iftar buffet at marriott islamabad and it was quite an experience
the spread was genuinely impressive with a wide variety that covers pretty much every craving you might walk in with after a long day of fasting

standouts for me were the sushi wellmade and fresh which is honestly not easy to pull off at a buffet the chicken tikka was spot on with the right char and smokiness and the fish steak was cooked beautifully
those three alone made the trip worthwhile
that said it wasnt all a win for me personally
the knafeh and a few of the other desserts and dishes didnt quite hit the mark more of a personal taste thing than a quality issue but worth mentioning for an honest review
overall its a mixed bag depending on your palate but the presentation throughout is topnotch youre paying for the full luxury experience and it shows
if youre looking for an iftar with variety atmosphere and that upscale setting marriott delivers
just go in knowing its more about the occasion than every single dish
i had a deeply disappointing experience at the marriott hotels islamabad this ramadan
while they host an extravagant iftar buffet to earn money fro
opportunity there was no azan no announcement for sehri in the cafeteria at timing of azan
i spoke with the duty manager who shockingly told me that management forbids any announcement fearing a loss of their fivestar rating
i clarified that i fully support keeping eateries open for all—for nonmuslims the elderly women who arent fasting and everyone else—so they can eat freely
i am not asking to close anything i simply asked for a small announcement or azan only in the restaurant so those observing suhoor know when it’s time
yet the manager refused citing the risk to their fivestar status

i pointed out that they openly celebrate christmas and new year with grand decorations like christmas trees so why not a ramadan announcement this is a fundamental issue of cultural respect and they sought seek exception even if there is any policy but the defeatist slavery mindset dominated

i request marriott international marriott bonvoy and government of pakistan urging them to enforce a policy where all hotels respect and recite azaan at sahoir and iftar time as culturalreligious traditions during ramadan
we must uphold dignity for faith while respecting all

islamabad marriott hotel is a fivestar luxury hotel located at aga khan road in the prestigious f sector of islamabad near the foothills of the margalla hills
it’s a popular choice for business travellers diplomats tourists and event hosting
offers a range of wellappointed rooms and suites with modern comforts
complimentary wifi spacious rooms and scenic views of the surrounding hills are among the highlights
airport shuttle service is available upon request
the hotel features a variety of dining venues including
nadia restaurant – international buffet experiences
the royal elephant – thai cuisine
kiku – japanese sushi and teppanyaki
zigolini’s – italian dishes
additional lounges and cafés offering beverages and light meals
indoor pool and fitness centre
spa and wellness services
meeting and event spaces suitable for weddings conferences and corporate gatherings
business centre concierge services valet parking and more
the hotel is conveniently situated near major islamabad landmarks like faisal mosque saidpur village and lok virsa cultural heritage sites
interestingly enough
in september the hotel was the site of a major suicide bombing attack which caused extensive damage and loss of life
the hotel was rebuilt and reopened later that year and continues to operate as a key landmark in islamabad’s hospitality sector

i stayed at the karachi marriott hotel from – april in an executive room
i am posting this review after exhausting every private channel with both the property and marriott international
the food poisoningon april at around pm i ordered seekh kebabs with a mint yoghurt dip from inroom dining
within hours i was severely ill — violent vomiting including the meal itself largely undigested diarrhea and acute abdominal pain through the night
i had eaten breakfast at the hotel and lunch at a separate restaurant earlier the same day with no symptoms in the fivehour intervening window
the timing pointed clearly to the room service meal
three weeks on back in dubai i am still experiencing gastrointestinal symptoms and undergoing further testing
the handlingthe hotel doctor was supposed to attend my room
he didnt
he prescribed remotely by phone while i was bedridden
the cost of the medication was then charged to my room — medication to treat illness from the hotels own kitchen
separately my bank card became stuck in the hotels inhouse atm on april
i was repeatedly told it would be returned
it was only physically returned on april — around days later
the hotels position is that the atm is operated by an external bank and therefore not their responsibility despite being on their premises and presented as a guest amenity
when i asked for the general managers email to escalate the food poisoning complaint the assistant fb director refused stating he did not have permission to provide it
the hotels whatsapp team also refused on multiple occasions
my initial email to the gm bounced because the property uses a separate local domain i had to identify myself
the investigationthe food was investigated via a sensory inspection by the executive chef and quality assurance team — looking for spoilage smell discolouration
i asked twice in writing whether actual microbiological laboratory testing was performed
the property did not answer the question in either response

in writing the property also characterised the phoneonly doctor consultation as being based on my preference it wasnt — the doctor did not come and claimed alternative meals were offered and declined to my recollection this did not happen and no record has been produced
the outcomethe general manager confirmed in writing that the property considers the matter closed
the only remedy offered was a deluxe suite upgrade on a future stay
i declined
i escalated to marriott internationals office of consumer affairs whose response — citing a licensing arrangement — was that the property is best placed to handle it and i should contact the gm again
the same gm who had already declared the matter closed
i have the full email correspondence the medication receipt photographic evidence of the meal and the propertys responses on file
i am a marriott bonvoy member and have stayed at marriott properties internationally without issue

the karachi property does not meet the standard the brand is sold on and the handling of guest complaints — particularly the obstruction of escalation — should be of concern to anyone considering a stay here
date of stay april trip type businessroom tip avoid inroom dining
if you have a complaint request the general managers email in writing immediately — expect to be refused

we had the most incredible time in dubai and our stay at the jw marriott hotel dubai was truly a highlight of our honeymoon
from the moment my husband made the reservation the hotel team helped him create something extraordinarily special for our arrival
he had arranged for rose petals champagne desserts and fruits and nuts to be set up in our room—but the staff went far beyond what we imagined
they added balloons with sweet valentine’s tags crafted an adorable swan from towels scattered rose petals across the bed and nightstands and even filled the bathtub with water and petals
walking into the room was such a magical and unforgettable surprise
throughout our stay the service was consistently outstanding
the staff warmly greeted us in the hallways welcomed us at the entrance opened car doors and always made us feel valued and cared for
housekeeping was exceptional—our room was kept spotless fresh towels were promptly delivered and even a bucket of ice was brought up upon request
during turndown service they thoughtfully prepared the bed and left bottled water and glasses ready for us adding another special touch to each evening
the buffet was equally impressive offering a wide variety of fresh and delicious options
the restaurant staff was attentive and ensured we had everything we needed
the location was perfect
we loved being able to walk easily through the mall and explore the beautiful dubai marina
having that kind of access made our stay even more enjoyable
our room had breathtaking views of the marina and the glittering highrise skyline at night—truly unforgettable
i couldn’t have asked for a more perfect honeymoon
every detail was thoughtfully handled and every moment felt special
it was an experience we will cherish forever

إقامتي في فندق jw marriott marina كانت جميلة بشكل عام
موقع الفندق ممتاز مباشرة على المارينا، وملاصق لمارينا مول مع مدخل مباشر للمول من داخل الفندق بدون الحاجة للخروج
الفيو من الغرفة على المارينا جميل جدًا، والغرف واسعة ونظيفة ومريحة، وخدمة الغرف ممتازة جدًا
صار في البداية سوء تفاهم عند الاستقبال وتأخر الحجز قليلًا، لكن تم حل المشكلة بسرعة واحترافية من قبل المدير أحمد صفوت، وتم عمل خصم على الغرفة لثلاث ليالي مع إفطار مجاني، وهذا يُحسب لهم
حجزت عن طريق marriott bonvoy، والخدمة كانت ممتازة
أشكر الأستاذ عادل في الاستقبال، وكذلك الأستاذة أماني، ابتسامتها راقية وتعاملها لطيف جدًا
الخدمة بشكل عام راقية وطاقم العمل يهتم براحة النزلاء
ملاحظات مهمة
ضغط الماء في الحمام ضعيف جدًا، وتم إبلاغ الفندق بذلك ولكن للأسف لم يتم حل المشكلة
استغربت وجود فوطة معلّقة في الحمام على أنها نظيفة، وتفاجأت بأنها غير نظيفة
تم إبلاغ الاستقبال اليوم، وتحدثت مع موظف اسمه إبراهيم مصري الجنسية، لكن حتى الآن لم يتم التواصل معي للاعتذار أو المتابعة، مع العلم أنني ما زلت مقيمة في الفندق وحجزي لثلاث ليالٍ
ملاحظة للعلم المسبح لا يوجد له قسم مخصص للنساء، وجميع المرافق مشتركة
تنبيه الخروج بالسيارة من الفندق قد يكون مزدحمًا بسبب وجود إشارة قريبة وازدحام زوار المول، خصوصًا في أوقات الذروة
اشكر الاستاذ عادل في الريسبشن لتسجيل الخروج المتأخر
شكر حار لشركة marriott bonvoy على توظيفها كفاءات متميزة في إدارة الفندق وحسن اختيار طاقم العمل

i rarely leave negative reviews but this experience at marriott resort palm jumeirah was extremely disappointing especially from a health and safety perspective
from the moment we arrived it was clear the hotel was not operating at the standard expected from a top marriott property
but this review is not due to this
the biggest issue was the air conditioning system
the ac was blowing out air that smelled damp and mouldy and by the second day i became sick from constantly breathing it in
what made this even more concerning was seeing air purifiers placed throughout multiple floors of the hotel which strongly suggests this is a known issue rather than an isolated incident
the team placed a massivenoisy air purifier wedged between my bed and the wall
besides the noise of it no mayor changes to the smell
there was a complete lack of accountability or care from management
not once did anyone call me after the repeated complaints visits to the reception apologise or attempt proper conflict resolution after we raised serious health concerns
there were a few emails bouncing back and forth between me and abigail lear who didn’t follow up with me even after providing my number
yes on the final night we were moved to a suite but that completely misses the point
i did not book this hotel hoping for compensation or upgrades
i simply wanted a comfortable safe and healthy stay at a premium property
health and safety issues related to air quality should never be ignored especially when guests are becoming ill

we stayed at the marriott hotel palm jumeirah with our family from april nd to april th and while the hotel itself is beautifully designed and has great potential our overall experience was unfortunately very mixed
one of the most disappointing aspects was the aed credit system
in our view this concept is unnecessarily restrictive and takes away from what should be a relaxing experience
instead of simply enjoying our meals we found ourselves constantly calculating how much credit we had left and which menu options would fit within it—both at cucina and the beach restaurant
this completely disrupted the feeling of a stressfree holiday
considering that the hotel was not busy during our stay this would have been the perfect opportunity to exceed guest expectations rather than limit services
the reasoning we were given—low occupancy—felt counterintuitive
in such situations guest satisfaction should be the top priority
we had booked half board specifically to relax without worrying about additional costs and we paid the full price well in advance
unfortunately the services provided did not match those expectations

several facilities were heavily restricted the pool closes at sunset around pm the beach is no longer accessible after that time and even the lights in public areas are turned off around pm creating the impression that guests are being sent to bed
this significantly limited our ability to enjoy the property especially in the evenings
the spa operating hours am – pm were also quite inconvenient

during the day most guests are naturally at the beach or pool while early mornings or late evenings would be the ideal time to visit the spa—yet those options were not available due to these restrictions
we were genuinely dissatisfied with the overall service limitations and even considered changing hotels during our stay
however i would like to highlight and sincerely thank several outstanding members of the staff tolgahan paul dinuka and banuka
their professionalism kindness and dedication made a significant difference and ultimately convinced us to stay
tolgahan went above and beyond in a truly exceptional way
when my mother fell ill he supported her with natural remedies and even coordinated with dinuka on his day off to arrange a tailored treatment for her flu
this level of care is rare and deeply appreciated
paul reacted immediately when he learned about our concerns and took proactive steps to improve our experience
throughout our stay he provided consistent professional support and made us feel heard and valued as guests
banuka was always friendly attentive and ensured we were well taken care of during our meals
dinuka also played an important role behind the scenes supporting us with genuine care and effort
as a business owner managing several companies in germany i understand very well how critical the right people are for attracting and retaining customers
the individuals mentioned above are exactly the kind of employees any organization should value highly and make every effort to retain
in conclusion while the hotel’s design and infrastructure are impressive the restrictive policies and limited service offering significantly impacted our experience
without the exceptional efforts of the staff mentioned our stay would have been far more disappointing
we are truly grateful for their commitment and support
on recuption there is one name is min very helpful very quick to solve any inquiry we have

we are residents of dubai and regularly stay at highend resorts so we have a clear expectation of service standards
we chose marriott resort palm jumeirah based on the reputation of the marriott brand
unfortunately this has been one of the most disappointing stays we have experienced
on our first day we ordered water at am
despite calling four times to follow up it was only delivered at pm
a twohour delay for such a basic request is not acceptable for a hotel of this level
the following day at the pool although the hotel promotes separate areas for families and adults this was not enforced
the adult pool and bar were filled with children which affected the overall experience
we raised this issue twice with management but no action was taken
the atmosphere did not reflect the standard expected from a marriott property
we also received five missed calls from the spa
when we returned the call we were told we had a booking which we had not made
despite explaining that we had been out of the room all morning the staff insisted the booking came from our room which was both confusing and unprofessional
finally we addressed all concerns with the reception manager name believed to be amayer
the response was disappointing
we explained that we rarely complain or leave negative reviews but due to the experience we requested a refund
instead we were told the issues would be investigated and that we might receive a room upgrade on a future visit
as we made clear we do not intend to return
overall this stay fell far below expectations both in service and in how concerns were handled
please note we have chosen not to include photos in this review out of respect for the privacy of other guests

our stay at marriott resort palm jumeirah was marked by extremely difficult and uncertain circumstances due to the regional military conflict

what could have been a very stressful and frightening experience turned into one where we felt supported safe and genuinely cared for — and this was largely thanks to the extraordinary professionalism and humanity of ms
rania chamoun
rania went far beyond the responsibilities of a hotel manager
from the very first moment she treated us not simply as guests but almost like family
she helped us extend our stay during a very uncertain period reassured us when anxiety and fear were high and constantly checked in to make sure we were safe and comfortable
what impressed us the most was that she offered this support even while the entire team was clearly under immense pressure
despite the exhaustion and the difficult circumstances around her rania remained calm compassionate and deeply committed to helping every guest
my wife is pregnant and during such a sensitive moment in our lives rania’s support meant more than words can express
she provided not only emotional reassurance but also practical help that made it possible for us to stay safely until we could return home
leaders like rania are rare
she leads with heart empathy and an exceptional level of professionalism
in our opinion she deserves the highest recognition and full trust to lead hotel operations because she represents the very best of what hospitality should mean
we will forever remember the kindness and dedication she showed us and we will always recommend marriott resort palm jumeirah to anyone visiting dubai
the level of care professionalism and humanity we experienced here was truly outstanding
thank you from the bottom of our hearts
we stayed at the marriott on palm jumeirah and honestly expected a much higher level of service
unfortunately our experience was disappointing
during our stay our tour operator cancelled our flight due to the situation in dubai
because of this unexpected situation we contacted the hotel to ask if it would be possible to extend our stay for one more night and whether they could offer any kind of discount
sadly there was almost no response from the hotel
no one contacted us no alternatives were offered and there was no attempt to assist us during a difficult situation
in moments like this you expect a hotel of the marriott level to show some flexibility and support for their guests but that did not happen
the hotel itself is nice — good location comfortable rooms and pleasant facilities
however the level of service and the way guest issues are handled in unexpected situations did not meet the expectations associated with the marriott brand
hopefully the hotel will pay more attention to supporting guests when unforeseen circumstances occur

这里的一切都很好，除了某一些酒店前台。 当我尝试续订两晚（已经提前定好，只需要在前台确定继续住在原来的房间并刷新一下卡），我提前一天去前台，一位女士和我说需要第二天第一个订单退房的时候再过来重新入住（好吧，这是我第一次见到这样的规则，但是我遵守你们的规则，尽管我需要再来一次）。 当我第二天过来按你们的规则说我要重新入住的时候，另一位女士（c开头，可能是claire 什么的名字，她用头发遮挡了名牌，这很不专业）一味的和我说今天已经定满了，她什么都为我做不了（我和她说了我昨天已经来过的事，并且那个同事说可以这样做的事，到她并没有因此去核查信息）。 这让我瞬间陷入巨大的担忧，觉得今天可能会露宿街头。 我就说让她去找昨天那个女士核对清楚，她就去房间里找了经理，在这个过程中我意识到我已经订了，你们必须给我房间，她出来后似乎也得到了这一信息，然后说可以给我办理了。 整个过程中她表现得非常不专业，没有问我住哪个房间，没有检查我是否有预定，遮挡名牌，只会一味的说今天订满了。 这还可以看出来，你们酒店的前台没有任何的工作交接， 简单的续住需要给每个前台都重新解释一遍。 以往在别的酒店我随时都可以去前台制卡，你们制定了和别人不一样的规则，却没有成熟的机制服务它（没有交接，也不去要求前台确认我的信息，我希望只是这位工作人员不专业），任何第一次来的人都会因此多跑几次前台并浪费口舌。 事后这位女士也没有表现出任何歉意，仍然在嘴硬的说她只是不知道我已经预定，这个经历让我在前台很尴尬，在一天开始的时候给了我糟糕的心情。

our stay at marriott resort palm jumeirah was truly phenomenal
unfortunately our trip began on a very difficult note
both of our young children became unwell during the flight before landing in dubai
what could have been an overwhelming experience was made manageable purely because of the incredible care empathy and professionalism shown by the marriott team
our daughter was admitted to hospital for four days and we had to extend our stay twice at very short notice
throughout this entire period the support we received from the hotel was exceptional
from guest services to the reception and booking team led by sauhardeep to housekeeping every single interaction was thoughtful proactive and genuinely caring
a special mention must go to santosh the chief head chef at laventera and his wonderful team
when our month old daughter was unwell they prepared special dietary meals tailored specifically for her needs
santosh personally ensured food could be arranged not only during her stay at the hotel but also sent meals to the hospital while she was admitted and continued to support us after her discharge
during an incredibly stressful time his care and warmth made it feel like we were at home even when we were far from it
this level of compassion and attention goes far beyond what one would ever expect from a hotel
the leadership and culture here under mr jinobin truly shine through the team
you can feel it in the way people care
special thanks to mr jinobin for all that he did for us during this difficult time
i have travelled extensively across all continents but i can honestly say i have never experienced customer service of this standard
not just efficient but deeply human
my wife our children and i are incredibly grateful

my husband and i booked this hotel for two nights in mid december as part of two week trip between the uae and the maldives
it was our first time to the region and this hotel
we booked the reservation the prior april for the palm deluxe double guest room double balcony for about aed per night through the marriott website
i am a marriott bonvoy lifetime platinum member
i also have the marriott bonvoy brilliant american express credit card

as part of my elite status we received free breakfast at the hotel however that was not needed because we were upgraded to the palm suite m club lounge access bedroom suite king sofa bed sea view balcony using two suite night awards
this upgrade came with access to the m club which served breakfast tea and happy hour throughout the day
the m club also seemed to have a full bar with complimentary drinks
the m club also had multiple balconies offering sweeping views of the dubai marina and palm jumeirah
this is a very large hotel more from a width perspective
when we were visiting it wasn’t particularly warm or cold and it was rainy so we didn’t use the pool or beach
despite not using these items the pool and beach area seemed very nice
our room had a great view of the dubai marina
our room was very spacious and modern
the hotel had daily cleaning and turn down service
i considered using the hotel’s laundry services but they were crazy expensive so i went to a local place nearby that did my laundry and delivered it back to the hotel the next day
the hotel has multiple restaurants throughout of differing cuisine and price point
there really didn’t seem to be a lot to do in the immediate area other than enjoy the beach and pool despite this we were able to get an uber or taxi within five minutes of needing one
the service at the hotel was generally mixed
finally you need a room key to get to any floor or are of the hotel reserved for guests
the hotel did have a mobile key available
i would come back to this hotel and i would recommend but i would probably first search other areas of dubai now knowing more about the area
finally as a gay american from nyc i never once felt uncomfortable with my husband
we did not wear our wedding bands while on this trip nor did we exhibit any public displays of affection but overall felt no concerns about being an openly gay man

our experience at dubai marriott harbour hotel suites was beyond disappointing — it was humiliating and shocking for a hotel that presents itself as a premium brand
we arrived intending to visit the restaurant
at valet parking a man aggressively informed us that once the car was parked we were not allowed to leave the hotel and that if we did we would be fined aed
i needed to step out briefly to a nearby pharmacy before dinner — a completely normal and reasonable request
we were told “no you have no right to leave
when we went to the reception desk to clarify this unbelievable rule the same valet followed us inside continuing to pressure and intimidate us
he repeatedly stated that he would not allow us to exit and told us to “take the car and leave” if we wanted to go to the pharmacy
the guy was showing zero respect to the customers
it is unacceptable
to demonstrate that we had no intention of leaving without using hotel services we asked whether we could book and prepay the spa in advance
this was done purely to reassure staff that we were legitimate guests — not because we still felt comfortable staying
we were offered the nearest available slot two hours later and paid aed for two people
by that point any desire to dine at the hotel was completely gone due to the hostile and humiliating treatment we had already experienced
unfortunately the spa experience itself was just as bad
there was no consultation whatsoever — no questions about medical conditions no discussion of preferences and no clarification of areas to avoid
they asked to put our names on some paper with no explanation
what followed cannot be described as a massage
it was random pressing with no structure or technique
when the therapist removed the hair tie from my hair she pulled it so forcefully that she nearly tore my hair out
instead of a proper head massage she tapped my forehead and scratched my scalp in a way that felt careless and unprofessional
my husband’s experience was equally uncomfortable
he was barely touched as if the therapist was afraid to perform the massage properly
the entire situation felt awkward unprofessional and deeply unsettling
to make matters worse the bathroom facilities were old poorly maintained and showed visible signs of mold and buildup — completely unacceptable for a hotel of this category and price point
let me be very clear
we paid aed for two people
in return we received harassment from valet day staff intimidation inside the hotel zero service standards at the spa and facilities that fail basic hygiene expectations
this experience is embarrassing for marriott as a global premium brand and far below what anyone should expect in dubai’s hospitality industry

i strongly advise management to urgently review valet policies staff behavior spa professionalism and sanitation standards — because this level of service is not merely disappointing it is unacceptable

the location the incredible service and the amazing experiences made this one of the best stays i’ve ever had

ドバイマリーナの最も東側の場所にあります。
まず観光客の方がドバイでホテルを探すのであればここでなくてもいいと思います。理由はここはホテルではありますがレジデンスとして利用してる人が多いのかペットの散歩などエレベーターで犬を連れている人も多いです。
そのため部屋の作りは生活するための作りです。キッチンや洗濯機もあり室内には個別の部屋があります。それぞれにバス・トイレがついているので気のあった仲間と泊まるのであればシェアハウスのようで楽しいかもしれません。
眺めはよく、北側にはパームジュメイラ、西側にはマリーナが見えます。残念ながら高層ビルに囲まれており、ドバイアイ（観覧車）やブルジュハリファは見えません。
プールやジムの利用は無料でジャグジーなども利用できます。
朝食は毎日メニューはほぼ同じ。パンの種類だけが変わります。
周辺はタクシーやハイヤーが多く停まっており混雑しています。タクシーがつかまりやすいのはいいのですがレンタカーなどで動く人には少し気を使います。
スタッフの対応は大変いいです。フレンドリーで親切です。
立地的には少し歩けばスーパーがあります。安く食べられるレストランがあったりします。マリーナモールまでは少し距離があります。

i planned a belated birthday celebration for my partner a week in advance and booked the m club king high floor suite directly through the app
it turned out to be a great decision—not just for the value but for the overall experience
i reached out ahead of time to request a great view and confirm arrangements and the team was responsive and accommodating throughout

the suite itself is absolutely worth it the floortoceiling windows offer a breathtaking view of the creek with burj khalifa and bur dubai in the distance—sleeping to and waking up to that view was unforgettable and the highlight of our stay
the room is spacious and wellstocked from the large bathroom with separate tub and shower to the complete amenities
what truly made the stay exceptional was the service
from my initial inquiries to checkout every team member was attentive warm and professional
the personalized birthday touches—greeting chocolates fruits and late checkout—made the celebration feel extra special

special thanks to the reception team—tracy for her patience and generosity kumar for safeguarding my id and ashmita for a smooth checkout the lounge team for their attentive service especially the lady who assisted us during the afternoon to happy hours on march whose name i unfortunately didn’t catch but truly deserves recognition along with maria and her team at breakfast and hannah—one of the friendliest guest relations associate i’ve met—together with ian heman and tamir at the copperhead for a wonderful dinner experience
last but not least to the housekeeping team who prepared our room and took the time to create the lovely towel art—your efforts are truly appreciated
while the current situation meant a slightly reduced spread in the lounge and breakfast the quality of service never dropped
the team’s consistency friendliness and attention to detail made all the difference
overall it’s the kind of place that makes you want to come back—and stay even longer next time

outstanding hospitality and service – a memorable stay in dubai
i spent about two weeks at the marriott marquis dubai creek at the end of february and beginning of march and i would like to sincerely thank the entire team for an outstanding stay
dubai was extremely busy during that time yet the entire staff handled everything with remarkable professionalism
every interaction i had with the team – from the front desk to the lounge staff and restaurant teams – was consistently friendly attentive and genuinely welcoming
you could clearly feel that the team takes pride in their work and in creating a great experience for their guests
as a titanium member i also greatly appreciated the room upgrade that was offered
small gestures like this make a big difference for frequent travelers and are always noticed and valued
a special mention goes to the marriott m lounge
it was always impeccably clean well organized and very professionally managed
the selection of food and drinks was excellent and the staff there were consistently warm attentive and proactive
it was a very comfortable space to relax or work during the day
i travel extensively and spend around days per year in hotels across different countries and brands
because of that i experience many different service standards – and unfortunately the level of service one hopes for is not always delivered
at the marriott marquis dubai creek however the team truly stood out
even by dubai standards which are already very high the hospitality here was exceptional
the evening buffet was very well organized with a great variety and excellent quality
breakfast was equally impressive – a huge selection beautifully presented and consistently fresh
a special thank you as well to the barista in the morning who quickly remembered my coffee preference before i even had to ask
these small personal touches are what transform a good hotel stay into a great one
everything was also extremely well organized during ramadan which is not always easy in busy hotels yet the team handled it smoothly and professionally
overall this was a fantastic stay and a great example of what true hospitality should look like
thank you again to the entire team for the excellent service – it was a real pleasure staying with you

这次入住真是意外的惊喜没想到竟然捡漏到了行政转角套房。房间超级宽敞，床品也非常舒服，睡得特别好。本来以为捡漏价就不包含行政待遇了，结果发现依然可以享受，真的太值了。行政早餐虽然没有主餐厅那么丰富，但整体品质在线，口味是正常的西式风格，既不会踩雷，也没有奇怪的猎奇菜品，比当地找早餐稳妥多了，关键是人少，任何时候去都不用排队，特别轻松。下午有点心，晚餐虽然没在酒店吃，但看了一下，也还算丰富。出行方面也很方便，没有感受到网上说的打车难问题。即使是春节期间，基本出门分钟内就能叫到车，很顺畅。想看迪拜塔景观的朋友，转角套房记得选tower b，能看到迪拜塔的尖尖。tower a的转角套房能看迪拜河，景观也不错。美中不足的是，酒店对客人的备注和邮件沟通似乎不太重视。我们前后住了三晚，离开前一晚还特意跟前台确认过，希望能安排高楼层，无烟房，并且把我们一家人的两个房间安排在同一塔楼，前台当时答应得很好。结果回来入住时，两个房间还是被分到了不同的塔楼，孩子的房间更是有明显的烟味，最后只能送来一个空气净化器补救。希望在细节服务上能再用心一点，整体体验会更完美。

酒店地处市区中心，入住时的服务周到细致，热情，介绍酒店服务项目详细。酒店有两座大楼a和b。 楼下有穿梭巴士来往dubai mall 很方便。 酒店坐落河边，晚上可以在河边散步。 这个酒店非常繁忙，酒廊也是经常人满为患。 一楼的早餐餐厅食物丰富，多样选择。m层的大平台和泳池空间开阔，健身房面积大设备齐全，每天运动的人都很多。
万豪侯爵酒店地理位置不错，酒店的早餐超级棒，忙而不乱，对于中国胃特别友好。阿拉伯食品也做的很入味。酒店的行李服务有序高效。在入住时，因为名字修改发生了小问题，携程第二天及时解决了。酒店有定时班车往返迪拜mall。
不過不失，是jw萬豪的基本水平，但因為酒店太大客容量太高，無論是電梯還是早餐都顯得有點超載。但代客拍車的服務很棒。
仅适合商务地理位置非常不方便，到迪拜mall高峰堵车分钟早餐人太多，尽管在努力维持秩序但是人流量远超其承载能力休闲度假慎重考虑 同价位更多优秀酒店
房间有很厉害的油烟味，串味了。酒店叫出租车很难，酒店门口乱哄哄的。其他还可以。酒店周边很一般，还在造楼。房间水龙头都是尖角，很容易划伤。淋浴间龙头挂不住的，老要掉下来。空调还不错。
the jw marriott marquis dubai is far more than a luxury hotel it is a destination in itself and a benchmark for fivestar hospitality in the middle east

rising elegantly above the dubai water canal in the heart of business bay the hotel’s iconic twin towers dominate the skyline and reflect marriott’s commitment to refined luxury scale and impeccable service
location first impressions
perfectly positioned between dubai mall and mall of the emirates and minutes from burj khalifa dubai opera and difc the hotel offers both convenience and prestige

from the moment guests enter the grand lobby the atmosphere conveys confidence sophistication and flawless organization despite the hotel’s impressive size of rooms and suites everything feels seamless and personal
rooms suites luxury at every height
the guest rooms and suites are thoughtfully designed with contemporary elegance floortoceiling windows plush bedding marble bathrooms and panoramic views of dubai’s skyline or canal

even entrylevel rooms feel generously sized while the executive rooms and suites elevate the experience further with access to the executive lounge offering premium dining privacy and attentive service throughout the day
culinary excellence a world class dining portfolio
one of the hotel’s most outstanding value propositions is its collection of over awardwinning restaurants bars and lounges making it a culinary hub not only for hotel guests but for dubai itself
highlights include
• kitchen an internationally acclaimed restaurant featuring six live cooking stations representing global cuisines offering one of the most impressive breakfast and dinner experiences in the city
• prime steakhouse located high above the city this refined steakhouse is celebrated for premium cuts exceptional wine selection and breathtaking views
• tong thai an awardwinning thai restaurant delivering authentic flavors in an elegant setting
• positano a true italian dining experience with fresh pasta classic recipes and an excellent wine list
• vault bar situated on the st and nd floors vault offers handcrafted cocktails premium cigars and unforgettable panoramic views making it a destination in its own right
this diversity and consistency across all dining venues add what can only be described as an “extra star” to the hotel’s overall offering
service the true signature of the hotel
what truly distinguishes jw marriott marquis dubai is its exceptional level of service
the staff demonstrate genuine warmth professionalism and attention to detail at every touchpoint from reception and concierge to housekeeping and restaurant teams
despite the scale of the property service feels personal proactive and consistently refined reflecting marriott’s global standards at their very best
wellness business added value
guests have access to the luxurious saray spa inspired by ancient wellness rituals featuring hammam experiences holistic treatments and a fully equipped health club
for business travelers the hotel offers nearly square meters of event and conference space positioning it as one of the leading business hotels in the region
complimentary shuttle services to key attractions such as dubai mall further enhance the guest experience reinforcing the hotel’s focus on comfort and convenience
final verdict
the jw marriott marquis dubai does not merely meet fivestar expectations it exceeds them
through its unmatched dining portfolio prime location worldclass facilities and outstanding service culture the hotel delivers a level of value and sophistication that truly sets it apart
it is an ideal choice for luxury leisure travelers business executives and discerning guests who seek a complete elevated hospitality experience
this is a hotel that genuinely earns and even surpasses its fivestar status

地理位置比较优越，机场出来搭地铁 red line到business bay，步行多分钟即可到达，去dubai mall酒店提供 shuttle bus，小时一班，很方便。整体设计大气。酒店虽有年代感，但维护的很好，非常干净，工作人员都很友善，会主动问好或提供帮助。连续住了三天，感觉相当不错，每天晚上的开夜床服务，还都会及时补充瓶装水更换使用过的卫浴巾等等。早餐餐厅很大，酒店的入住率很高，大部分时间需要排队，但等候时间不是很长，餐食品种多，西式的，日式式的，中式的，印度式的都有。在酒店的日料餐厅，用了晚餐，口味不错。酒店泳池是一亮点，可以远观哈利法塔，傍晚时分景色很美。酒店性价比很高，尤其让我们惊喜的是，我们飞机到达之后直接进入酒店，就给我们入住了，开心。推荐，推荐，推荐。

真的不能看他人的差评，每个人需求程度都不一样，我们出来玩就是要开心，方方面面都满意。记得有一天回酒店早，房间收拾好了，早上落下的太阳镜边放了新的擦镜布，孩子的手机电线用收线夹整理好，真的非常细心。躺了一会儿，又去酒店泳池玩，酒店m层户外泳池可以看到哈利法塔，以为不会再收拾了，回来房间又给收拾好了，我摆在床头的贵重首饰都在，出去吃个晚饭，回来正好遇到做也床服务的两个小哥哥和我们行礼。真的，一天玩累回来，每次进房间都整齐温馨哪有心思挑毛病，只怪自己没换好外币没小费给🙉餐厅kitchen非常大，你以为被带去的位置非常偏，可是整个餐厅到处都有咖啡机、烤吐司机、远的地方也有重复的取餐台，简直不要太便利。虽然被推荐这家酒店是因为有中餐，可是我一次也没吃，没必要非得吃中餐，那个蒸鱼非常不错，吃了两次，其他都随机，几天胃肠超稳定。哦，对了，第一天领位的小姐姐给打的卡布奇诺好贴心捎带给我奶杯和一份浓缩，以前我去过的都是假五星吗🙉

i recently stayed at jw marriott dubai and felt compelled to share my experience which unfortunately fell far below my expectations
i have been a loyal jw marriott member for over years in india and have always chosen the properties expecting fivestar service especially during a special trip with my mother
however my recent stay in dubai left me feeling more like i was at a two or threestar property
my concerns began upon arrival around midnight
i had two suitcases with me yet none of the multiple staff members present in the lobby offered assistance though i observed them helping other guests
upon checking in i had already prepaid for my room and paid taxes via card
later i received a call from the reception claiming my payment hadn’t gone through
i immediately verified my bank account and confirmed that the payment had been processed
given it was almost a
i offered to drop by at the reception the very next day
the following day i went to the reception as requested and was asked to show the card i used
i was informed that the issue was a system error and they have received the payment
at no point was there an acknowledgment of the inconvenience this caused which i found disappointing
on the night of my arrival i had also ordered room service
the staff member delivering the food did not provide a payment machine and instead asked me to sign a bill
so after the payment issue was resolved the individual at the reception told me that i immediately need to pay for the food i ordered in a tone that was unprofessional
i made it clear that i was happy to pay but i did not understand the rush or the attitude

the staff member even smirked and waited impatiently while i explained that if i can make the payment for the entire stay which was approximately dirham i am fully capable of paying dirham for the meal
but the behaviour of this individual was completely inappropriate and made me question the level of hospitality
additionally i reported a leaking tap in my room which i was later told had been fixed
unfortunately it was not resolved when i returned in the evening
i would also like to highlight an issue around breakfast arrangements on one of the mornings
i had an early skydive booking at a
which required me to leave the hotel around – a
while my mother remained at the hotel

knowing that the skydive activity typically takes – hours i proactively messaged the hotel to ask whether it would be possible for my mother to have a small portion of breakfast packed for me as breakfast was already included in my booking
i also clearly mentioned that i am vegetarian
the initial response i received was an outright no with no effort to explore alternatives or solutions
it was only after i reiterated that breakfast was already paid for and included in my stay that an option was eventually offered
in my experience of travelling globally i have never encountered a fivestar hotel where the default response to a reasonable guest request is simply “no” without attempting to find a middle ground
while i understand that not every request can be accommodated hospitality should involve problemsolving and flexibility not repeated refusals
this interaction further reinforced my disappointment and added to the overall negative impression of my stay
overall my experience was extremely disappointing particularly given the high expectations i had from jw marriott
the combination of inattentive staff poor communication and unprofessional behavior made the start of my stay regrettable and i cannot in good conscience recommend your property based on this visit
i hope you take this feedback seriously and address these issues to prevent future guests from experiencing the same frustrations

非常推荐，这家万豪已经是我到迪拜白名单的酒店了。首先地理位置很好，去迪拜 mall 或者世界贸易中心都很近。十几分钟吧第二打车非常方便，基本上 分钟内车就到了。第三，早餐巨好吃，早餐丰富的不行，什么都有，它的早餐是很棒的。第四个酒店本身的硬件和软件都很好，房间是正常的万豪酒店房间，服务态度很好。第五个酒店楼上有一个很漂亮的泳池，泳池旁边有一个不错的餐厅，然后还有按 spa 的地方。作为一个商务酒店，还挺舒服的。它的缺点是下楼附近没有地方可以逛一逛，是一个标准的商务酒店，满足所有商务的基本配套。还有一个好的就是楼层很高，风景很好，我记得应该是住在四十多楼，楼上的风景特别好，而且每天下午有 happy hour ，下午 点到 点可以到 lounge 去喝下午茶，风景很好。要约客人谈事情，可以直接约到 lounge 去沟通事情，还不收费。晚上 点到 点还有一个 happy hour， 也是可以到 lounge 去喝东西的，所以整体还挺不错的。
